summary: List of Actual Production Quantity Ids
description: Returns a list of Actual Production Quantity Ids.

parameters.name: filters[unit_of_measure]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified unit of measure.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[timesheet_id]
parameters.description: Timesheet ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Timesheet ID.

parameters.name: filters[crew_id]
parameters.description: Crew ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Crew ID.

parameters.name: filters[location_id]
parameters.description: Location ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Location ID or a range of Location IDs.

parameters.name: filters[date]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
